name: Read Miss when EDS drop DD

properties.field_value: This test validates compression and deduplication with quarter compression patterns and director failure simulation. It disables DCB, writes data with various compression/dedup ratios (4K-16K-4K-16K, 12K-24K-12K-24K, 8:1, random), drops an EM director to DD to simulate failure, clears cache, verifies data integrity through read operations, recovers the director, runs CBNK scan, and performs comprehensive error checking.

description: This test validates compression and deduplication with quarter compression patterns and director failure simulation. It disables DCB, writes data with various compression/dedup ratios (4K-16K-4K-16K, 12K-24K-12K-24K, 8:1, random), drops an EM director to DD to simulate failure, clears cache, verifies data integrity through read operations, recovers the director, runs CBNK scan, and performs comprehensive error checking.
